site.name: My Baby Pictures
site.tagline: Premium maternity, newborn, baby and family photography in Delhi NCR
site.description: A warm, polished photography studio in East Delhi creating maternity, newborn, milestone, birthday, family, event and festival portraits for families across Delhi NCR.

seo.title: My Baby Pictures | Premium Baby, Maternity & Family Photography Delhi NCR
seo.description: Explore premium maternity, newborn, milestone, cake smash, family, event and festival photography by My Baby Pictures in East Delhi and across Delhi NCR.

hero.eyebrow: East Delhi studio. Delhi NCR sessions.
hero.title: Premium portraits for the first stories your family will tell forever.
hero.copy: My Baby Pictures creates calm, carefully styled photography experiences for expecting parents, newborns, babies, birthdays, family portraits, rituals, events and festival memories.
trust: Baby-safe posing and gentle session flow
Curated outfits, wraps, props and backdrops
Edited digital galleries with album add-ons

story.title: Warm direction, polished styling and a calm space for little people.
story.copy: Led by Gaurav and the MBP team, the studio specialises in photographing babies and families with patience, safety and a refined visual style. Every session is planned around the child's age, the family's comfort and the kind of memory you want to preserve.
points: Dedicated East Delhi studio in Saini Enclave, Karkardooma
Serving Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad and Ghaziabad
Category-specific themes, pricing and media galleries
Future-ready content model for new categories, offers and AI tools

categories.title: Maternity
categories.label: Maternity Photography
categories.eyebrow: For the weeks before everything changes
categories.summary: Elegant portraits for expecting mothers, couples and families.
categories.description: A relaxed maternity session with gowns, gentle posing and styling that celebrates the softness and strength of pregnancy.

faqs.q: When should I book a maternity shoot?
faqs.a: Most families book between 28 and 34 weeks, when the bump photographs beautifully and movement is still comfortable.

faqs.q: Can my partner and child join?
faqs.a: Yes. Couple, sibling and family frames can be added to maternity sessions.

categories.title: Newborn
categories.label: Newborn Photography
categories.summary: Gentle newborn portraits with wraps, baskets, parents and sibling frames.
categories.description: A baby-led newborn experience designed around feeding, settling, safe posing and warm studio comfort.

gallery.alt: Sleeping newborn in bee costume on a themed setup
gallery.caption: Themed newborn

gallery.alt: Wrapped newborn portrait with name board
gallery.caption: Wrapped detail

gallery.alt: Newborn in a wizard costume theme
gallery.caption: Creative themes

faqs.q: What is the best age for newborn photos?
faqs.a: The ideal window is usually 5 to 15 days, but lifestyle newborn portraits can be planned later too.
Yes. The studio keeps baby-safe wraps, baskets, backdrops and accessories ready.

categories.title: Milestone
categories.label: Milestone Photography
categories.eyebrow: Every new expression deserves a chapter
categories.summary: Three-month, six-month, sitting, crawling and first-year portraits.
categories.description: Playful milestone sessions for babies who are discovering expressions, movement, food, props and personality.

gallery.alt: Baby in Krishna costume playing flute
gallery.caption: 3 to 6 months

faqs.a: Tummy time, sitting, crawling, standing, first birthday and seasonal milestones all work beautifully.

faqs.q: Can we use a custom theme?
faqs.a: Yes. Share references in advance so the studio can plan props, colors and outfits.

categories.title: Birthday / Cake Smash
categories.label: Birthday & Cake Smash
categories.summary: Cake smash, pre-birthday and one-year portraits with playful themes.
categories.description: A bright, expressive birthday session that can include clean portraits, family frames, cake smash and a splashy finale.

faqs.a: Cake can be arranged as an add-on or brought by the family after discussing color and allergy preferences.

faqs.q: Can we do a pre-birthday shoot before the party?
faqs.a: Yes. Many families book a pre-birthday shoot for invitation images and decor displays.

categories.title: Family Portrait
categories.label: Family Portraits
categories.summary: Studio and lifestyle portraits for parents, siblings and extended families.
categories.description: Family sessions are directed with warmth and polish so everyone looks comfortable, connected and naturally themselves.

gallery.alt: Parents and baby close family portrait
gallery.caption: Close connection

faqs.a: Yes. Larger groups can be planned with extra time and a suitable backdrop or location.
Yes. The team directs expressions, hand placement, sitting arrangements and natural candid moments.

categories.label: Event Photography
categories.summary: Baby showers, birthday parties, naming ceremonies, mundan and family events.
categories.description: Event coverage blends candid storytelling, family portraits, decor details and ritual moments with optional video and BTS capture.

bts.title: Family moments
bts.copy: Short clips and candid frames preserve the atmosphere beyond formal portraits.

faqs.a: Yes. Event pages can include highlight films, embedded videos, BTS clips and photo galleries.
Yes. Additional hours and a second photographer can be added depending on event scale.

categories.title: Festival Based
categories.label: Festival Photography
categories.summary: Christmas, Janmashtami, Holi, Diwali, Raksha Bandhan and more.
categories.description: Festival sessions are built around seasonal styling, child-friendly props and limited-edition sets for keepsakes, cards and social memories.

bts.title: Seasonal set changes
bts.copy: Festival pages can publish fresh set previews, BTS clips and limited-slot announcements.

faqs.q: Are festival shoots available all year?
faqs.a: Festival sets are seasonal and slot-based. Booking early is recommended.

faqs.q: Can new festivals be added later?
faqs.a: Yes. New festival pages can be added to the CMS category list without changing templates.

testimonials.name: Paras Abbi
testimonials.quote: Our newborn photoshoot was magical. The team was kind, patient and attentive throughout the session, and the final images are memories we will preserve forever.

testimonials.name: Shashank Thakur
testimonials.quote: It was an overwhelming experience and three hours of pure self love. We were excited from the session itself.

testimonials.name: Nikita Sharma
testimonials.quote: The communication was seamless, the studio was warm and welcoming, and the photos captured our baby's personality beautifully.

testimonials.name: Ashish Arora
testimonials.quote: We had a very good Janmashtami shoot and used their services for both sons. Comfortable environment for small newborns and nice service.

testimonials.name: Abhika Mittal
testimonials.quote: The team clicked miracle pictures of my baby, including newborn and Janmashtami themes. They were supportive and calm with babies and parents.

testimonials.name: Jyoti Sharma
testimonials.quote: They handled my 26-day-old baby with care and created a warm, protected space during winter. The experience was smooth and stress-free.

testimonials.name: Shuchi Abhiruta
testimonials.quote: My first shooting experience with my six-month baby was smooth. The team was generous, polite and lovely to work with.

faqs.q: Where is the My Baby Pictures studio?
faqs.a: The studio is in Saini Enclave, Karkardooma, East Delhi, with sessions available across Delhi NCR.

faqs.q: Is pricing the same for every category?
faqs.a: No. Pricing is managed per category, so maternity, newborn, events, festival and other sessions can each have their own packages and add-ons.

faqs.q: Can I update images, pricing and FAQs without code?
faqs.a: Yes. The site is generated from editable content files designed for CMS or non-technical updates.

faqs.q: Do you support videos and behind-the-scenes content?
faqs.a: Yes. Category pages can include embedded videos, short clips and BTS content blocks.
Use the inquiry form, call the studio or message on WhatsApp to check availability and reserve a slot.
